---
title: "matplotlib demo"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---



```{python}
#| label: fig-polar
#| fig-cap: "A line plot on a polar axis"

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 5, 0.01)
theta = 2 * np.pi * r
fig, ax = plt.subplots(
  subplot_kw = {'projection': 'polar'} 
)
ax.plot(theta, r)
ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)
plt.show()
```

<!-- comentario -->
Hola que tal  buenos días esto es una prueba en "Quarto"

(quarto.jpeg)


* Shoping List
  + Bread
  + Milk
  + Eggs
  + Cheese
    - Cheddar
    - Mozzarella
    - Parmesan
    - Swiss
  + Beefs
    - Ground Beef
    - Steak
    - Roast Beef
    - Brisket

display math:

$$E = mc^{2}$$

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Hard edge] --> B(Round edge)
  B --> C{Decision}
  C --> D[Result one]
  C --> E[Result two]
```

<div class="border">
  <p>This content can be styled with a border</p>
</div>

>Bloques
